step_rationale: CAD susceptibility locus; long noncoding RNA regulating SMC splicing and plaque inflammation; MI risk gene.
mechanism: CDKN2B-AS1 is a 9p21 locus CAD-risk lncRNA that epigenetically controls smooth-muscle-cell function and atherosclerotic inflammation.

references.title: Genetic Regulation of SMC Gene Expression and Splicing Predict Causal CAD Genes.
Genome-wide association study on coronary artery disease in type 1 diabetes suggests beta-defensin 127 as a risk locus.
Association of six genetic variants with myocardial infarction.
From genotype to phenotype in human atherosclerosis--recent findings.
